sentences.arabic: كَانَ دَرْسُ العُلُومِ اليَوْمَ مُثِيرًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Danas je čas prirodnih nauka bio jako uzbudljiv.
sentences.translationEn: Today's science lesson was very exciting.

sentences.translation: Nastavnik je donio sjemenku, zemlju i vodu.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher brought a seed, soil, and water.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ كَيْفَ تَنْمُو النَّبَاتَاتُ مِنَ البَذْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Objasnio je kako biljke rastu iz sjemenke.
sentences.translationEn: He explained how plants grow from seeds.

sentences.arabic: زَرَعَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ بَذْرَةً فِي كُوبٍ صَغِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je zasadio sjemenku u malu čašu.
sentences.translationEn: Each student planted a seed in a small cup.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَ الطُّلَّابُ أَنْ يَسْقُوا البَذْرَةَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su obećali da će zalijevati sjemenku svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The students promised to water the seed every day.
